draftNote: 1 of five queued off a bottom-two lane: Mr_Meat31 (support→offlane).

coaching.headline: A win you stole on lane leads — you LOST the neutral objectives 16–29 and the early Fangtooths, but out-towered them 8–7 and your mid/carry took over.
coaching.team: No healers on either side, so itemization was free. You lost the objective war badly (16–29) yet won because Willy's Gadget and Goldilocks' Legion snowballed their lanes and you converted to towers. That's fragile — group the Fangtooth more and you don't need lane heroics. Tower conversion is what saved it.
coaching.whatShiftedIt: Contest the Fangtooth as a group — you gave the early ones and only the lane leads bailed you out. Convert those leads to objectives, not just kills.

perPlayer.10edbf65-457d-48d0-9151-9df5b4fcb40a: Gadget mid (10/5/9) carried the lane and snowballed — but you lost the objective war (16-29) you should be calling as lead; convert lane leads to neutrals sooner.
perPlayer.16f28434-561f-4f23-9454-40321f4a1ef3: Legion 10/4 snowballed the carry lane despite the unfavored read vs Sparrow — the lane lead is what bailed out the lost objective war (16-29).
perPlayer.a0c393cc-1437-4bdc-8168-64676ce2166c: Greystone offlane into a favored Murdock — solid hold that helped out-tower them 8-7.
perPlayer.7c8ab99c-31c5-4ea5-a6fa-e0d6417c3f1b: Phase support (0/4/11) — good low-death enabling (11 assists); the loss to fix was the objective war (16-29), not your lane.
perPlayer.a412baf3-dd17-4f89-8ecf-9d0704f3a79e: Khaimera on your lane and favored, 1/7 — you enable (13 assists) but need to win neutrals, which you lost 16–29.

synergy: Your engage/CC: Gadget Security Gate (root 1s). Your kills come from landing burst INSIDE that CC window — whoever lands it, the rest must follow up immediately.
You have sustain (Phase) — favor the longer fight where your heals out-grind them.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Telekinetic Link an ally → Psychic Flare blind → Energy Lance → Hyperflux buff ult
ourKits.winCondition: buff a hyper-carry through the Link and Hyperflux for a teamfight
ourKits.passive: abilities heal her and her linked ally
ourKits.playWith: the strongest carry to Link and supercharge
ourKits.playAgainst: kill the linked carry, not Phase; break the link timing

ourKits.combo: Assault The Gates leap → Make Way armor shred → Sacred Oath empowered basic → Stone Forged Soul stasis ult
ourKits.winCondition: front-line aggressively and reset the fight with the stasis heal
ourKits.playWith: a team that fights while he soaks and stasis-resets
ourKits.playAgainst: don't waste burst into his stasis — wait it out; anti-heal cuts the ult heal

ourKits.combo: Security Gate root → Sticky Mine → Tesla Dome zone ult
ourKits.winCondition: root with the gate and trap a fight inside the Tesla Dome
ourKits.passive: FDA stacks grant scaling magical power
ourKits.playWith: frontline that holds enemies in her Dome
ourKits.playAgainst: dodge the gate; spread vs the Dome — she's immobile, dive her

ourKits.combo: Ambush leap → Unleash AS → Cull stun, Invigorate to cleanse+heal
ourKits.winCondition: stick on one target, stun with Cull and out-sustain via Spirit Regen
ourKits.playWith: follow-up burst inside his Cull stun
ourKits.playAgainst: ANTI-HEAL is mandatory — it guts his whole kit; kite the leap and CC through Invigorate

enemyKits.combo: Bull Rush knockback → Force Shield wall → Shield Slam knockup+stun ult, Shield Bash %hp
enemyKits.winCondition: peel the carry with walls/knockups or engage with Shield Slam
enemyKits.playWith: a carry he can wall for and peel
enemyKits.playAgainst: his Force Shield blocks projectiles — reposition around it; bait Shield Slam

enemyKits.combo: Piercing Shot poke → Heightened Senses AS → Hail of Arrows zone → Inner Fire ult
enemyKits.winCondition: ramp Relentless + AS and sustained-DPS the front down
enemyKits.playWith: heavy peel — she's immobile and pure DPS
enemyKits.playAgainst: she has zero escape — hard-engage her and she dies first

enemyKits.combo: Reaping Dash → Hamstring slows → Safeguard spellshield → Earth Shatter execute
enemyKits.winCondition: trade with the spellshield up and execute low targets with Earth Shatter
enemyKits.passive: permanent power on unique hero takedowns
enemyKits.playWith: setup that holds a target for the execute
enemyKits.playAgainst: bait Safeguard's spellshield before committing your key CC

enemyKits.combo: Static Trap root → Buckshot → Hot Pursuit AS → Long Arm of the Law global snipe
enemyKits.winCondition: trap for the root, then out-range with Shots Fired and finish with the global ult
enemyKits.passive: every 5th basic is a long-range bonus shot
enemyKits.playWith: frontline/peel to protect his low mobility
enemyKits.playAgainst: almost no escape — engage past the trap and he dies

enemyKits.combo: Void Breach slow → Cosmic Rift → Black Hole on the grouped enemies
enemyKits.winCondition: land Black Hole / Cosmic Rift on a clumped team for AoE burst
enemyKits.passive: an ability-empowered basic tethers a target for bonus damage
enemyKits.playWith: hard engage that clumps enemies into his Black Hole
enemyKits.playAgainst: immobile with long cooldowns — dodge the skillshots and dive him once Black Hole is down
